raw_text:
```json
{
  "claims": [
    "Phillips 66 is closing its California refinery, which accounts for 8% of California's refining capacity.",
    "Valero is considering shutting down its two California refineries due to the California regulatory environment.",
    "The recently passed refinery storage mandate risks higher average gas prices and fuel shortages.",
    "An independent study projected that the update to California's Low Carbon Fuel Standard could raise gas prices by as much as 65 cents per gallon.",
    "California drivers pay the highest gas taxes in the nation, adding 88 cents per gallon to the cost of gas.",
    "Environmental mandates add an additional 45 cents per gallon to the cost of gas in California.",
    "California gas prices are currently $1.44 above the national average."
  ]
}
```
